description_long: This bungalow features a single-story structure with a wide, overhanging gable roof covered in dark shingles. The front facade includes a small covered porch with railings, a central entrance, and a mix of vertical and horizontal siding in neutral tones. Large windows are distributed along the sides and rear, providing ample natural light, while wood panel accents add warmth to the exterior. The foundation is clad in stone or concrete, elevating the building slightly above the surrounding green lawn. The rear and side elevations display a combination of grouped and individual windows, with one side featuring a secondary entrance and steps. The overall design is modern yet retains classic bungalow proportions and simplicity.
description: A modern single-story bungalow with a wide gable roof, wood accents, large windows, and a small front porch.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, covered porch with railings, and a mix of wood and light-colored siding.
description_view_1: Side view with two large wood-paneled windows, a secondary entrance with steps, and no porch visible.
description_view_2: Rear view featuring several large windows and a long stretch of light siding with a wood accent panel.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with large windows and a prominent wood accent section, no visible entrances.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped and individual windows on all sides
